title: Illumina Library Construction for FMS and PRP Samples
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ingcdbw

steps.title: End-repair step following Fortes & Paijmans...
steps.instruction: End-repair step following Fortes & Paijmans 2015, with T4 Plynuclease kinase and T4 Polymerase, and heat inactivation of the enzymes (to remove column clean-up step). Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

steps.title: Ligation step following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015 with 0
steps.instruction: Ligation step following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015 with 0.5 µM of Illumina P5 and P7 adapter mix (20 µM each). Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

steps.title: Purify Adapter-ligated libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE)
steps.instruction: Purify Adapter-ligated libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).

steps.title: Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB
steps.instruction: Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB. undetermined, Buffer EB

steps.title: Fill-in step of the adapters before...
steps.instruction: Fill-in step of the adapters before library indexing, following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015. Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

steps.title: Perform indexing PCR reactions in a...
steps.instruction: Perform indexing PCR reactions in a total volume of 15 µL with AmpliTaq Gold (Applied Biosystems) with Primer IS4 and individual Indexing Primers, following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015. The total number of cycles did not exceed 10 for the first round of amplification. Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

steps.title: Verify indexed libraries with Agilent Tapestation...
steps.instruction: Verify indexed libraries with Agilent Tapestation HS (Agilent) for fragment size estimation and molar concentrations.

steps.title: Perform parallel amplifications for each sample,...
steps.instruction: Perform parallel amplifications for each sample, with corrected number of PCR cycles, in order to avoid over-amplification and increased read clonality.

steps.title: Purify indexed libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE)
steps.instruction: Purify indexed libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).

steps.title: Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB
steps.instruction: Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB. undetermined, Buffer EB
